title.purpose: Nav links, period labels, stat labels.

label.purpose: Smallest tier — stat headers, footer, live delta badges.

shadows.name: hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover glow on gained numbers and buttons.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus-visible ring on all interactive elements.

components.name: Nav Pill (Active)
components.description: Active navigation pill. Solid green background, dark text, green glow.
components.css: .ds-nav-pill-active { display: inline-block; background: #00FF41; color: #0A0A0A; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; padding: 6px 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.3); transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-nav-pill-active:hover { background: #00FF41; }

components.name: Nav Pill (Inactive)
components.description: Inactive navigation pill. Dim text, transparent background.
components.css: .ds-nav-pill-inactive { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #999; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; padding: 6px 12px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-nav-pill-inactive:hover { background: rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.1); color: #F5F5F0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Terminal-styled search input with > prompt glyph.

components.name: Repo Row
components.description: Single leaderboard row: rank, repo name, sparkline, gained value, live delta.
components.html:
1vercel/next.js
+3,482+159
components.css: .ds-repo-row:hover { background: rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.03); } .ds-rank { color: #999; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; text-align: right; width: 32px; } .ds-repo-row:hover .ds-rank { color: #00FF41; } .ds-name { flex: 1; min-width: 0; color: #F5F5F0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-repo-row:hover .ds-name { color: #00FF41; } .ds-repo-row:hover [style*="color: #00FF41; font-weight: 700"] { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #00FF41); }

components.name: View on GitHub Button
components.description: Border-only outlined button linking to GitHub.
components.css: .ds-btn-gh { display: inline-block; color: #00FF41; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.5); padding: 6px 12px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-gh:hover { background: rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.1); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.3); }

narrative.overview: RepoSurge is a competitive leaderboard rendered through a terminal lens — green phosphor on deep black, flat rows, and glow rewards for action. The system rejects all SaaS dashboard conventions: no cards, no sidebars, no rounded corners, no decorative illustrations. Every interface decision serves a single goal: let a developer scan the rising-repo ranking at a glance and immediately see who is winning.
keyCharacteristics: Monospaced throughout. One font, one weight range (400–700).
Flat surfaces with green glow as the only elevation signal.
Rows, not cards. Leaderboard logic, not dashboard logic.
High contrast: #00FF41 on #0A0A0A is 15.4:1. Dim #999 on #0A0A0A is 5.3:1.
Green selection highlight — select any text to see the phosphor glow inverted.

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Terminal green is the only accent color. Used on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Surface Rule
rules.body: No surface uses a different background than midnight. Containers are implied by spacing and borders, never by a separate fill.

rules.name: The One-Font Rule
rules.body: Every visible character is JetBrains Mono. No serif, no sans-serif, no second mono.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Glow appears only as a response to state (hover, focus, active).

dos: Use terminal green (#00FF41) sparingly — the single accent rules.
Keep surfaces flat at rest. Glow only on interaction.
Use JetBrains Mono for every visible character.
Use generous vertical spacing (py-4 on rows, mt-32 on footer) to let the black background breathe.
Use gradient sparklines (from-terminal/20 to-terminal/70) — the gradient makes them feel alive.
Use tabular-nums for all numeric data so numbers don't shift during updates.
Add title attributes on truncated text for overflow tooltips.
donts: Don't use cards, sidebars, rounded corners, or container shadows.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative illustrations.
Don't use a second font family — no serif, no sans-serif alternative.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: no sidebar nav, no stat cards, no header metrics.
Don't use border-left stripes, numbered section markers (01/02/03), or uppercase tracked eyebrows.
Don't use shadows on containers — only green glow on interactive elements.
Don't stretch nav pills — they must be content-sized (px-3 py-1.5 with no explicit width).
Don't show the same sparkline size on detail page as list — detail sparkline gets h-32 (128px).
